omitted_declarations.policy_reference: • With third-party marketing, advertising, analytics and similar partners. We may allow third-party business partners (including analytics companies and marketing and advertising partners such as ad agencies and network advertisers) to use cookies, pixel tags, web beacons, SDKs, scripts and/or similar technologies on our Services and emails to collect information about you and your activities on the Services, as described further in the “Your Choices and US State Privacy Rights" section below and in the Privacy Preferences tool accessible via the footer of our Services. We may also share (or permit third parties to collect) certain data, such as Automatically Collected Information, aggregated or de-identified, pseudonymized or hashed data (including email addresses), with these third parties for similar purposes, including to help segment and build audiences to support our interest-based advertising on third-party platforms. These third parties may set and access their own tracking technologies on your device (including cookies, pixels, or other technology) and may otherwise collect or have access to your personal data over time, including about your visits to the Services as well as other websites and online services, some of which may be personal information or personal data under various state laws. Companies that we share data with, including ad agencies and networks, may use the data, often in combination with their existing data, in order to present more relevant advertisements that may be of interest to you, and to help us and third parties to do the same.

Companies that we share data with, including ad agencies and networks, may use the data, often in combination with their existing data, in order to present more relevant advertisements that may be of interest to you, and to help us and third parties to do the same.

• Other information or content that you provide through our publicly accessible blogs and community forums, or other content you provide (“User Content"). Your submission of User Content is governed by our Terms of Use. Any information you provide publicly in these areas may be read, collected, and used by others who access them or shared by them with third parties, and the use of your data by third parties is not subject to this Policy.

Sale and Sharing of Personal Information/Targeted Advertising. We do not have actual knowledge that we "sell” or “share" the personal information of known minors under 18 years of age.
However, we do sell and share certain categories of personal information as defined under CCPA, and in the preceding 12 months, have sold and shared personal information as follows:
Categories of Personal Information “Sold” and “Shared"
Categories of Third Parties to whom Personal
Information is Sold/Shared for Targeted Advertising
Identifiers such as name, email address, and IP address.
Personal Information categories listed in the California Customer
Records statute such as name and address.
Commercial information, such as information (including transaction
and listing information) about tickets bought or sold, including tickets
bought as a gift.
Information about your interests and preferences, such as
information about the Services you purchased, obtained, considered,
or other purchasing or consuming histories or tendencies.
Third party marketing and advertising and analytics,
social media platforms, and similar partners for
marketing and targeted advertising purposes.
With select Event Partners for direct marketing and
targeted advertising purposes.
Internet and other electronic network activity, such as device
information, location information, browsing navigation, and other
information regarding a user's interaction with our Services.
Third party marketing and advertising and analytics,
social media platforms, and similar partners for
marketing and targeted advertising purposes.
